name: Deads On The Road
description: Zombies have surrounded this place! The struggle to escape has never been so difficult. On dark roads, a zombie that suddenly appears in front of you can destroy you! Be very careful not to get caught by zombies while trying to escape. You must be on your guard at every moment. How many meters can you run? Click for a breathless fight!
instructions: Movement A-D Speed Up W Slow Down S Fire Mouse Left Click Sword-Katana Right Click of the Mouse
